parsed_review.summary: CP00-770 (Migration Platform fixture implementation, risk B, 40 units, RP25.P05.M02.S15-RP25.P05.M04.S12) passes hardened read-only review. The CP770 binding and requirements in registry.js match the pack baseline exactly (risk B, 40 units, range, next CP00-771/RP25.P05.M04.S13, deliverable distribution test:6/hermes_evidence:2/implementation:13/fixture:13/claude_review:2/security_audit:4, micro-title distribution 6/22/12); a hand-count of the 40 included units confirms the distribution. service.js generators (case set, descriptor, Hermes evidence, Claude packet, closeout handoff) follow the consistent descriptor-only pattern and apply MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION; validators.js coverage and descriptor validators enforce descriptor-only output, no source-system/import runtime opening, no sensitive payloads, no cross-tenant access, no audit-body/permission-decision leak, no unverified-knowledge creation, no replay execution, and Hermes/Claude gate plus handoff integrity. import-plan.js and mappers.js are descriptor-only/no-write and require human mapping approval; index.js re-exports cleanly; README CP00-770 section is accurate. model.test.js contains meaningful CP00-770 assertions (coverage deepEqual empty errors, descriptor validation, authority boundary claude_is_final_approval=false and runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-771, runtime-closed flags, latest contract projection). command-evidence.json shows all required validation commands (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) at exit_code 0, status passed_pending_hardened_review. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold; Hermes is used only for deterministic descriptor-only review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime; Claude remains read-only and non-final. The pack does not prematurely claim production_ready (manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, inspection verdict PENDING_REVIEW) and correctly gates promotion behind this review with human final approval reserved for enterprise-trust/runtime opening; the descriptor-only production_ready_flag is appropriately scoped. CP178+ evidence hardening is intact: the pre-review placeholder (0-byte stdout) is correctly not counted as a valid receipt and readiness auth-preflight passed. Changed-file scope correctly separates active pack refs from unrelated dirty files with no active untracked implementation files omitted. No P0-P3 findings.
